variants: Tien Dang is a skilled innovator in the construction industry, currently employed by Frameward Construction. Born in Petrel's Bluff, he now resides at Sunnybrook Arcade, where he continues to impact his field. Tien is the inventor of the Amber Current Stabilizer, which has been instrumental in improving engineering practices. His dedication and innovative spirit were officially recognized when he received the Shellborn Plaque, highlighting his excellence in the industry.
